summary: Flash Attention rewrites attention execution for faster and more memory-efficient kernels.

selected_base_repo.evidence: Kernel structure and low-level launch patterns closely resemble Triton implementations.

mappings.evidence: The fused kernel corresponds to the IO-aware attention implementation in the paper.
